caption: In an outdoor setting with red earth and a reddish-brown building, a group of people stands together. A woman dressed in a green short-sleeved top and matching green trousers stands to the right, holding a small white object. To her left is a line of five children. From right to left, they include a girl in a pink dress and white headscarf, a girl in a white top and blue skirt, a boy in a yellow shirt, and two boys in patterned dark blue sweaters. A banana tree with large green leaves stands behind the group. Across all frames, the group remains mostly stationary, facing the camera with neutral expressions. White on-screen text is overlaid across the center of the scene, stating, "There is no internet, there are not even computers." The scene remains consistent in composition and lighting throughout the sequence.
